title: Nearly 300 tourists rescued after cable cars halt mid-air
full_text:
Nearly 300 tourists rescued after cable cars halt mid-air
Nearly 300 tourists rescued after cable cars halt mid-air
Around 300 people were stranded mid-air after a technical malfunction halted the Gulmarg Gondola system in Indian-administered Kashmir. Emergency crews used ropes and ladders to rescue passengers from suspended cable cars.
Published On 25 May 2026
